concerns.text: Task T020 implements 'Spatial-GPD with Gaussian Copula' but the spec (FR-004) mandates a 'Brown-Resnick max-stable process'. The task silently relaxes the specific model requirement without a corresponding spec amendment or explicit 'staged' flag, violating the constraint that tasks must not weaken FRs.

Task T028/T029 implement 'Global Dependence, Local Prediction' for LOSO, but the spec (FR-006) mandates standard 'leave-one-station-out cross-validation' (implying full re-fitting). The task list omits the full re-fitting logic required by the spec, constituting a silent relaxation of the validation methodology.

Success Criterion SC-003 requires measuring 'empirical coverage of 95% confidence intervals... constructed via block bootstrap'. No task in the list (T019-T042) implements block bootstrap sampling or calculates CI coverage, leaving this success criterion unmeasurable and the spec requirement unfulfilled.

The spec 'Assumptions' section mandates a 'sensitivity analysis' sweeping thresholds over {90th, 95th, 99th} percentiles. The task list only implements the 95th percentile (T013), silently dropping the required sensitivity analysis scope.
